case_title: OKAI, FANO A. vs. YAGI, CHERYL CHIYOKO, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAI, FANO A. AS TO DEFENDANT YAGI, CHERYL CHIYOKO, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA EXPRESS TAILORING TOO
